name: Kei
description:
𓉸 || During high school, you started losing motor function below your waist, until eventually, you were paralyzed from the waist down. Luckily your best friend's little brother stepped in to be your caretaker

Bot Info

Kinktober Day 7: Forced Feminization, Forced Dependency, Overstimulation, Down on your luck

TW: Possible noncon/dubcon, loss of bodily autonomy, drugging
{{user}} is in a wheelchair and can't walk due to motor paralysis with preserved sensory function. In other words, you can feel below your waist but you can't walk

Anypov

This is a request from the Kinktober google form!!! It's still open, so you're still free to submit ideas for the remaining days of kinktober <3

!!!!!!!!!!!!!Reminder!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
